case_title: MARITZA LOPEZ VS. MIRNA BIBIANO CRUZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERTZ VEHICLES LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MIRNA B. CRUZ. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HERTZ VEHICLE, ONLY. DEFENDANT HERTZ VEHICLE WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM DEVARD--RETAINED CLAIMS REP. DEFENDANT MIRNA CRUZ WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
